name: qa
description: All-in-one QA toolkit for Claude Code; commands are namespaced /qa:<name>. Automation (Playwright Web + Appium iOS/Android), auto-routing by platform (web/android/ios) to load only the matching skill: sitemap/exploratory/plan-tests/find-elements/cook/run/fix/analyze/count-cases/review/push-code/merge-request. sitemap crawls the whole app/web (or one feature) to declare every screen's elements + build the navigation map — discovery only, no tests/bugs. Manual QA with distinct command names: analyze-spec/plan-gen-testcases/gen-testcases/count-testcases/log-bug/update-board.
